lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no visible wear on the interior or exterior. All mechanical and electronic systems are fully functional and operate as new. The car has been meticulously maintained according to the manufacturer's schedule.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The engine is strong and the transmission shifts smoothly, providing a dependable driving experience for its next owner. While the car is mechanically sound, there are some minor cosmetic imperfections, such as small stone chips on the hood and slight wear on the driver's seat bolster, consistent with its age. All electronics and features are fully functional, and the interior has been kept clean and smoke-free. This is a solid, reliable choice for anyone looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous stewardship and uncompromising maintenance. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the secondary market. Mechanically sound and aesthetically impeccable, this motorcar offers an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning professional. We invite you to experience a vehicle that defies its age and sets the benchmark for excellence.

Hey there! I am honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—it's been babied since day one and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! No scratches, no dents, and the interior still has that fresh feel. You really have to see it in person to believe how clean it is. If you're looking for a ride that's basically perfect, this is the one for you. Drop me a message and let's get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered icon, presenting in collector-grade condition. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six delivers linear power through its six individual throttle bodies, with the double-VANOS system meticulously serviced for peak variable valve timing. The chassis remains factory-spec with proactive subframe reinforcement, ensuring optimal torsional rigidity under load. Power is delivered via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential. Suspension geometry is perfectly aligned, featuring fresh bushings and original Sachs dampers. Every fluid service is documented, and the rod bearing recall has been proactively addressed. A true turn-key investment for the discerning purist seeking mechanical perfection.
One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records. Original paint. Interior spotless. Mechanical inspection welcome.

Presented in absolute showroom condition, this vehicle is a rare find for the most discerning buyer. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, thanks to a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage and a recent professional ceramic coating. Every body panel is laser-straight with perfect factory gaps. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear and still retain their original factory scent. The dashboard, trim, and carpets are immaculate, protected since day one by custom floor mats. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It features a documented, full-service history performed exclusively at authorized dealerships, with every scheduled maintenance item addressed ahead of time. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the undercarriage shows no signs of road debris or weather exposure. All original keys, manuals, and a thick binder of service receipts are included. This is a collector-grade example that drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every aspect of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, untouched interior—adheres to the most exacting standards of preservation. Mechanically superior and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it offers an uncompromised driving experience for those who demand excellence without exception.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty. It's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor—super clean, not a scratch on it, and it runs like an absolute dream! I've totally babied this car since day one, and it's looking completely flawless inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new without that dealership price tag, this is definitely the one for you! Drop me a message and come take a look, I promise you won't be disappointed! ✨

Available for acquisition is a pristine 1994 Mazda RX-7 (FD3S), a masterclass in lightweight engineering and rotary performance. This specimen features the 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged power plant, which maintains exceptional compression across all rotor faces. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise five-speed manual gearbox and a factory Torsen limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis exhibits zero torsional fatigue, retaining its original double-wishbone suspension geometry and aluminum components free of galvanic corrosion. Every factory VIN sticker is present, confirming the integrity of the body panels. Thermals are managed by an unmolested cooling system, critical for the longevity of the apex seals. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a rotary icon in its purest, factory-spec configuration, devoid of the typical aftermarket modifications that compromise engine harmonics.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service records included. Inspections welcome.
